form.formComment: Drops in distance on last start and first look at this trip. Looks a strong winning hope.

form.formComment: Good performance to win by half a length at this track over 350m (19.43) beating Greta's Gold in Grade 5 on April 12. Strong form emerging from the that last run. Leading chance.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Was out of the placings last time at Ballarat but prior to that had been racing consistently, notching four minors in a row. Aided by a low draw but will need the right run to feature.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage eighth last time out over 400m at Warragul. Doesn't look smart enough to threaten the top few.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 2 lengths over 400m at Geelong in a handy (22.66), beating Spring Brumby. Expected to run well again.

form.formComment: Charged out of the boxes with a strong early sectional but swamped late when a close up fourth (22.37) at Warrnambool over 390m. Strong form emerging from the that last run. Leading chance.

form.formComment: Has finished fifth at her last couple of starts, most recently at this track over 300m. Capable of taking this out.

form.formComment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at Warragul over 400m in 22.89 last start, beating Extremity. Winner last time and looks well placed again. Worth following up.
